programmes.show_description: We kick off the brand new series of 'Living with Lucy' with GAA legend Davy Fitz. Lucy heads to Sixmilebridge Co. Clare, where Davy is living with his partner and his son. (SL,HD)
Multi award winning and critically-acclaimed detective drama strand starring Robbie Coltrane as the wise-cracking Fitz, a brilliant but flawed criminal psychologist. (HD)
